title: Cipher Mining Inc (CIFR) Surpasses Analyst Revenue Forecasts in Q1 2024
text: Cipher Mining announced strong Q1 2024 results with impressive financial performance. The company reported GAAP Net Income of $40 million, dramatically outpacing the $2.62 million estimate, while Non-GAAP Adjusted Earnings reached $63 million. Revenue totaled $48 million for the quarter, slightly underperforming the $50.75 million forecast. However, earnings per share achieved $0.13, significantly exceeding the projected $0.01. The mining operation demonstrated substantial growth, with the self-mining hash rate at approximately 7.7 EH/s and plans to reach 9.3 EH/s by Q3 2024. The company is constructing the Black Pearl data center with an anticipated 300 MW capacity operational by 2025. Cipher's balance sheet strengthened considerably, with total assets climbing to $677.141 million from $566.137 million year-over-year. Management highlighted the company's strong financial position and aggressive expansion strategy positioning it competitively within the Bitcoin mining sector.
